annual_rate.notes: Derived: Iowa Code §668.13(3) sets judgment interest at the 1-year Treasury constant maturity (Fed H.15) "settled immediately prior to the date of the judgment" + 2 percentage points, computed daily (§668.13(5)). This series applies the weekly-average H.15 value + 2pp for each week. A contract rate governs if the judgment is on a contract that fixes one (§668.13(2)). Confirm against the Iowa Judicial Branch table; not legal advice.
